proposed_relations.description: Market research finding about LGA airport employee commute patterns

evidence_refs.source_quote: Most airport employees who commute by transit live in Queens, Upper Manhattan, or the Bronx.
Many employees ride transit, primarily the M60 and Q33. Shift times impact the ability to use transit
